## Qaid v0.2.0 — Parity with vanilla `main`

Eight features ported from the vanilla repo that landed after this fork
was branched. Each shipped as its own atomic commit so the diffs and
intent stay readable — see `PORT_FROM_VANILLA.md` for the original spec.

### New features

- **Game registry** ([5a5eb3d](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/5a5eb3d)) — single source of truth for per-mode defaults (`numPlayers`, `defaultThreshold`, `winRule`, `isTeamMode`, `configurable`, `contractsEnabled`). Home and Setup screens drive their behavior from this map. Adding a fourth game no longer requires touching every branch.
- **Player profiles** ([2cbeab8](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/2cbeab8)) — lifetime per-player record (games played, wins, last played, teammates) logged at every game-end. New TopPlayers strip on Home; ProfileSheet for the per-player view; native `<datalist>` typeahead on every player-name input on Setup.
- **History clear UI** ([99dcb98](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/99dcb98)) — Clear links on the Top Players + Recent Games section headers, `×` button on every recent-game row.
- **Top-2 teammates** ([a4c1401](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/a4c1401)) — ProfileSheet shows up to 2 most-frequent partners.
- **Undo snackbar** ([52d8fca](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/52d8fca)) — non-blocking 4s toast after every round commit with an Undo action button. Replaces the old `window.confirm` flow.
- **Share-as-PNG** ([96bd5e8](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/96bd5e8)) — Share button on Winner screen renders a 1080×1350 PNG (light + dark palettes, RTL-aware) and offers it via `navigator.share` with `<a download>` fallback.
- **Haptics + sounds** ([129e1ca](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/129e1ca)) — short vibration + audio blips on round commit, undo, and game-over (C5/E5/G5 arpeggio). Sound toggle in the Home header alongside theme.
- **Screen transitions** ([4b29c05](https://github.com/halhouti-glitch/Qaidb3-React/commit/4b29c05)) — directional 200ms fade + horizontal slide between Home → Setup → Play → Winner. Respects `prefers-reduced-motion`. RTL-flipped.

### State shape

Two new fields on `localStorage["cardScoreTracker_v1"]`:

- `playerProfiles: Record<string, Profile>` — lifetime memory keyed by `name.toLowerCase().trim()`.
- `sound: boolean` — default `true`.

Existing installs spread-merge defaults — no migration needed.

### Verification

- `npm run typecheck` clean
- `npm test` 52/52 (engine: 36, profiles: 16)
- `npm run build` 295 KB Workbox precache (17 entries)
- StrictMode-safe screen-transition derivation
- Custom-mode teams toggle (the fork's exclusive feature) preserved

### Compatibility

No breaking changes. The localStorage key + shape are unchanged; new fields populate via the existing `loadState` spread.
